NAVAREA XIX 112/23
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT MILITARY OPERATIONS I PERIOD 28 AUGUST - 8 SEPTEMBER 2023, DAILY BETWEEN 08:00  AND 18:00 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREAS:

 ALPHA
 A. 69-31.50N 016-13.00E
 B. 69-31.50N 016-45.00E
 C. 69-21.00N 016-45.00E
 D. 69-21.00N 016-13.00E

 H. 69-14.59N 016-58.04E

 2. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS ASKED TO PAY ATTENTION TO THE NOTIFIED AREAS DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODS,
 CONTACT ANDOEYA SPACE FOR COORDINATION. ON TELEPHONE  +47 76 14 45 82 OR MARITIME VHF CHANNEL 16/14, AS WELL AS EMAIL: MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO
